analysis: Seven nights and you opened strong — 8 hours 27 on the first night with nearly 2 hours of REM, which is your body absolutely eating up whatever wind-down ritual you brought to that evening. The middle of the stretch got a little wild: that 5 hour 57 night was rough, and then you swung all the way to 9 hours 22 the following night like your body just said "nope, we're correcting that immediately," which honestly it did. The back half has been consistently in the 7-hour range, which is solid, but your deep sleep has been creeping low — 23 minutes on the most recent night is worth watching, because that's where the real repair happens and your body deserves the full treatment. Keep showing up with the routine, because the nights where it's all firing together are genuinely gorgeous numbers.
